TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carl Braun sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1927 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, Carl Braun, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) qnxan nya Carl Braun htagan beh sa Brooklyn,New York . 1945-1947 kawas mtzyaw beh Colgate hopa pqwasan biru. qega qhyang nya lga lahan nya mzyu mari na pincwagan la.raral ga Carl Braun ini kbsyaq sakang' pspung na mzyu mari maki New York Yankees. 1947-1948 kawas tmwang Knicks NBA pspung. 1950 kawas Braun ga blaq balay squliq na p'unro. Carl Braun sangka' mopuw cyugal NBA pspung. 1950-1952 kawas ini sangka' pspung,cyux mtzyaw mhetay pincwagan nya. 1948-1954 kawas Braun tmwang te sazing NBA hlahuy. 1947 kawas 12 byacing 6 ryax,wal magal 47 分. 1962 kawas Carl Braun tmasoq pincwagun nya. Carl Braun sangka' magal NBA pspung,qnxan na pincwagan magal 10625分. 1960-1961 kawas hiya ga mzyu mari pcbaq seto maki Knicks. 2019 kawas hiya wal magal blaq balay mzyu mari sqabu maki Amelika. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarl βraun s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨarl βraun, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarl βraun ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βrookljn,new jork . ****-**** kawas~ɕ mtzjaw βeħ ʦ~ʨolɣate ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. qeɣa qħjaŋ nja lɣa laħan nja mzju mari na pinʦ~ʨwaɣan la.raral ɣa ʦ~ʨarl βraun ini kβs~ɕjaq s~ɕakaŋʔ ps~ɕpuŋ na mzju mari maki new jork jankees~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ nβa ps~ɕpuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ βraun ɣa βlaq βalaj s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨarl βraun s~ɕaŋkaʔ mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal nβa ps~ɕpuŋ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ini s~ɕaŋkaʔ ps~ɕpuŋ,ʦ~ʨjux mtzjaw mħetaj pinʦ~ʨwaɣan nja. ****-**** kawas~ɕ βraun tmwaŋ te s~ɕaziŋ nβa ħlaħuj. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,wal maɣal ** *. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨarl βraun tmas~ɕoq pinʦ~ʨwaɣun nja. ʦ~ʨarl βraun s~ɕaŋkaʔ maɣal nβa ps~ɕpuŋ,qnxan na pinʦ~ʨwaɣan maɣal ******. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa mzju mari pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕeto maki kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ ħija wal maɣal βlaq βalaj mzju mari s~ɕqaβu maki amelika. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Carl Braun sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1927 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, Carl Braun, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) qnxan nya Carl Braun htagan beh sa Brooklyn,New York . 1945-1947 kawas mtzyaw beh Colgate hopa pqwasan biru. qega qhyang nya lga lahan nya mzyu mari na pincwagan la.raral ga Carl Braun ini kbsyaq sakang' pspung na mzyu mari maki New York Yankees. 1947-1948 kawas tmwang Knicks NBA pspung. 1950 kawas Braun ga blaq balay squliq na p'unro. Carl Braun sangka' mopuw cyugal NBA pspung. 1950-1952 kawas ini sangka' pspung,cyux mtzyaw mhetay pincwagan nya. 1948-1954 kawas Braun tmwang te sazing NBA hlahuy. 1947 kawas 12 byacing 6 ryax,wal magal 47 分. 1962 kawas Carl Braun tmasoq pincwagun nya. Carl Braun sangka' magal NBA pspung,qnxan na pincwagan magal 10625分. 1960-1961 kawas hiya ga mzyu mari pcbaq seto maki Knicks. 2019 kawas hiya wal magal blaq balay mzyu mari sqabu maki Amelika. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨarl βraun s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨarl βraun, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja ʦ~ʨarl βraun ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βrookljn,new jork . ****-**** kawas~ɕ mtzjaw βeħ ʦ~ʨolɣate ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. qeɣa qħjaŋ nja lɣa laħan nja mzju mari na pinʦ~ʨwaɣan la.raral ɣa ʦ~ʨarl βraun ini kβs~ɕjaq s~ɕakaŋʔ ps~ɕpuŋ na mzju mari maki new jork jankees~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ tmwaŋ kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ nβa ps~ɕpuŋ. **** kawas~ɕ βraun ɣa βlaq βalaj s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨarl βraun s~ɕaŋkaʔ mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal nβa ps~ɕpuŋ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ini s~ɕaŋkaʔ ps~ɕpuŋ,ʦ~ʨjux mtzjaw mħetaj pinʦ~ʨwaɣan nja. ****-**** kawas~ɕ βraun tmwaŋ te s~ɕaziŋ nβa ħlaħuj. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,wal maɣal ** *. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨarl βraun tmas~ɕoq pinʦ~ʨwaɣun nja. ʦ~ʨarl βraun s~ɕaŋkaʔ maɣal nβa ps~ɕpuŋ,qnxan na pinʦ~ʨwaɣan maɣal ******. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa mzju mari pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕeto maki kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ ħija wal maɣal βlaq βalaj mzju mari s~ɕqaβu maki amelika. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
